itemListElement.reviewBody:
If you want your child to have a traumatic experience pls enroll here

Worst experience of Montessori admission process at Global Montessori centre, Gopalapuram. Expected more professionalism from the teachers. Teachers expect students eligible for primary to leave the parents and go for the interview. At the tender age of 3, they expect this. That too my child agreed to go to Ground Floor but they want children to come to second floor without parents. Will the Teachers had this kind of maturity at this age. And was rejected because of this. Never heard in any other school that at primary level kids are harassed mentally. Pls understand that this is their first schooling. In the name of interaction don't harras the children mentally. In no other school prior to grade 1 children are asked for one on one interaction. Some kids are being dragged inspite of them crying so badly and they come out and say rejected. Don't create trauma amongst parents and children by providing such bitter experience.

Learn from other reputed institution how they treat children friendly and give a feel at home experience atleast at primary level.

Have enquired amonst friends abd family who have their kids admitted in Chettinad Vidyashram, KFI, Harish ree Vidyalaya, Narayana Techno park. In any of these schools, Nowhere primary children are called for interview leaving parents.

If kids are harrased mentally during interaction itself, I was just imagining how they would be treated during schooling.

There were no reviews for this school while I applied.. hence posting this painful experience.

Parents you can also refer to NPS, gopalapuram school reviews where these kids are transferred from UKG to 1 st grade and continue till 12 th.. Parents have given honest reviews that would match my painful experience.

My child got admitted in Narayana Techno. Teachers parents and the child is especially happy with the admission process she is now eagerly asking wen we can go to school again. That kind of impression children should get after seeing a school and teachers for the first time.

Not a traumatic experience like the one many parents are facing in NPS.

This school has proven useless since 2002. Geography teachers would teach cbse math! And blame children and parents for diminishing grades. If anyone wants a good education please avoid approaching this school.  I seriously ask this management,  if profit making is the only goal then there are a lot of businesses that one can do but not education.  Pathetic.

Money minded school.. issuing form from oct .. and when we contacted school about our form status which we submitted them in oct they said all seats are full and principal said directly so much bad about my caste. But still they are making money by giving forms .

A truly terrible school. Teachers are allowed to treat students however they please. They treat students like punching bags for their own joy and the administration is ignorant to complaints. The only thing this school teaches you is to fear them. A prison in all ways. Teachers make it their own personal mission to make students they don't like's life miserable, In many cases pushing students to tears. Teachers cross the line into harassment in many cases by intruding into children's private life and even sexualising and shaming them. The worst possible place to send your child. If you love them, learn from my mistakes and don't send them here.
